title: Dynamic phosphoproteomics reveals TORC1-dependent regulation of yeast nucleotide and amino acid biosynthesis
author_string: Oliveira, Ana Paula, Ludwig, Christina, Zampieri, Mattia, Weisser, Hendrik, Aebersold, Ruedi et al.
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract: The effect of phosphorylation on metabolic enzyme activity could be inferred by correlating phosphoproteomics and metabolomics data.
